# Ghosxt

> Ghosxt provides managed IT services and cybersecurity for small businesses on
> California's Central Coast and beyond. The company is run by a DoD-cleared IT
> engineer and delivers government-grade infrastructure, security, and 24/7
> monitoring at small-business pricing. Based in Salinas, CA, Ghosxt serves the
> Monterey Bay, Salinas Valley, San Benito County, and Silicon Valley.

Key facts:
- Business: Ghosxt (managed IT services provider / MSP)
- Location: Salinas, California, USA (serves the surrounding region)
- Phone: +1 (831) 204-0501
- Email: sales@ghosxt.com
- Differentiator: founded and run by a cleared DoD IT engineer; enterprise-grade
  security without an enterprise price tag
- Pricing (published): Core Managed IT $125/user/mo, Secure Growth $175/user/mo,
  Compliance & Continuity $250/user/mo; flat-rate Tiny Team Managed Security
  $600/mo for teams of 1–4 users
- Free 30-minute IT assessment with no obligation

## Services
- [Managed IT Services](https://ghosxt.com/managed-it-services): 24/7 monitoring, helpdesk, patching, Microsoft 365, and backup for small business.
- [IT Help Desk & Support](https://ghosxt.com/help-desk-it-support): live, US-based IT help desk and end-user support, remote and on-site across the Central Coast.
- [IT Consulting & vCIO](https://ghosxt.com/it-consulting-vcio): strategic IT roadmap, budget, security and compliance strategy, and vendor-neutral vCIO guidance.
- [Cybersecurity](https://ghosxt.com/cybersecurity): endpoint protection, MFA, immutable backups, and audits with government-grade rigor.
- [Cloud Services & Microsoft 365](https://ghosxt.com/cloud-services): Microsoft 365, Azure, and hybrid cloud with hardened tenants and no-downtime migrations.
- [Backup & Disaster Recovery](https://ghosxt.com/backup-disaster-recovery): immutable backups, tested restores, and ransomware-ready recovery.
- [Network Design & Architecture](https://ghosxt.com/network-design): VLAN segmentation, firewalls, and business-grade wireless with real documentation.
- [Website Development](https://ghosxt.com/website-development): custom small-business websites and e-commerce that load fast and convert.
- [C-TPAT Compliance](https://ghosxt.com/ctpat): IT controls and documentation for supply-chain security certification.
- [CMMC & NIST 800-171](https://ghosxt.com/cmmc-compliance): CMMC and NIST SP 800-171 readiness for small defense contractors and subcontractors, from a cleared DoD IT engineer.
- [HIPAA IT Compliance](https://ghosxt.com/hipaa-it-compliance): HIPAA technical safeguards for medical and dental practices — security risk analysis, access controls, encryption, BAAs, and backup.
- [PCI DSS Compliance](https://ghosxt.com/pci-compliance): practical PCI compliance for retail, restaurants, and hospitality — segmentation, secure POS, scanning, and SAQ guidance.
- [Co-Managed IT](https://ghosxt.com/co-managed-it): augments an existing in-house IT team with a 24/7 help desk, after-hours coverage, and cybersecurity depth, without replacing anyone.
- [Ransomware Recovery & Emergency IT](https://ghosxt.com/ransomware-recovery): rapid containment, recovery from immutable backups, and hardening for businesses that are down or under active attack. Emergency line (831) 204-0501.
- [Break-Fix vs. Managed IT](https://ghosxt.com/break-fix-vs-managed-it): an honest comparison of the two IT support models on cost, downtime, and security.
- [Pricing](https://ghosxt.com/pricing): transparent, published managed IT service plans.

## Industries served
- [Agriculture & Agribusiness IT](https://ghosxt.com/agriculture-it-services): Salinas Valley growers, food processing, and ag-tech.
- [Trucking & Logistics IT](https://ghosxt.com/trucking-it-services): C-TPAT, ELD, fleet, and dispatch systems.
- [Manufacturing IT](https://ghosxt.com/manufacturing-it-services): OT/IT, ERP, and CMMC.
- [Healthcare & Medical IT](https://ghosxt.com/healthcare-it-services): HIPAA, EHR, and PHI protection.
- [Professional Services IT](https://ghosxt.com/professional-services-it): law firms, CPAs, and small offices.
- [Property Management IT](https://ghosxt.com/property-management-it-services): Yardi and AppFolio environments.
- [Engineering & A/E IT](https://ghosxt.com/engineering-it-services): CAD, BIM, and ITAR.

## Service areas (by county)
- [Monterey County](https://ghosxt.com/monterey-county): Salinas, the Peninsula, and South County (on-site).
- [Santa Cruz County](https://ghosxt.com/santa-cruz-county): Santa Cruz, Watsonville, and the Pajaro Valley (on-site).
- [San Benito County](https://ghosxt.com/san-benito-county): Hollister and San Juan Bautista (on-site).
- [Santa Clara County](https://ghosxt.com/santa-clara-county): San Jose, Gilroy, and the South Bay (on-site).
- [San Luis Obispo County](https://ghosxt.com/san-luis-obispo-county): remote-first managed IT across the Central Coast.

## About & contact
- [About Ghosxt](https://ghosxt.com/about): the DoD-cleared engineer and approach behind the company.
- [Client Stories](https://ghosxt.com/case-studies): real Ghosxt clients in their own words — transportation/logistics, manufacturing, and local projects.
- [Contact / Free IT Assessment](https://ghosxt.com/contact): schedule a no-obligation 30-minute assessment.
- [Ghosxt Cares](https://ghosxt.com/ghosxt-cares): community work and discounted IT for nonprofits.
